warning_message: Use calming blood-pressure regulation sequence.
notes: Protocol-level support for blood pressure instability.

warning_message: Use breath-sensitive respiratory support sequence.
notes: Protocol-level support for bronchial asthma / respiratory sensitivity.

warning_message: Use soothing digestive sequence during acid-irritation tendency.
notes: Protocol-level support for ulcer-flare / APD care.

warning_message: Use calming bowel-regulation sequence during IBS / UC flare tendency.
notes: Protocol-level support for bowel-flare care.

warning_message: Avoid forceful Kapalabhati during severe hypertension.
notes: Source-backed caution for strain-producing pranayama.

warning_message: Avoid Bhastrika during severe hypertension.
notes: Source-backed caution for forceful pranayama.

warning_message: Avoid headstand preparations during severe hypertension.
notes: Inversion-related blood pressure caution.

warning_message: Avoid Sirsasana during severe hypertension.
notes: Inversion-related blood pressure caution.

warning_message: Avoid headstand preparation during pregnancy.
notes: Pregnancy caution for inversions.

warning_message: Avoid Sirsasana during pregnancy.
notes: Pregnancy caution for inversions.

warning_message: Avoid headstand preparation when vertigo or balance instability is present.
notes: Balance-risk caution for inversions.

warning_message: Avoid Sirsasana with vertigo or balance instability.
notes: Balance-risk caution for inversions.

warning_message: Adapt or reduce jogging if blood pressure is unstable.
notes: Dynamic exertion may require adaptation when blood pressure is unstable.

warning_message: Adapt jogging during active respiratory sensitivity.
notes: Dynamic exertion may require adaptation when asthma is easily triggered.

warning_message: Use Tiger Breathing gently during acute ulcer or digestive irritation flare.
notes: Abdominal-loading practices may need adaptation during flare.

warning_message: Use Kapalabhati cautiously during severe digestive irritation.
notes: Forceful abdominal action may aggravate acute digestive irritation.

warning_message: Use deep relaxation instead of strain-producing or inversion practices during pregnancy.
notes: DRT is a safer positive support option in pregnancy contexts.

warning_message: Short guided relaxation can support rest during pregnancy when adapted comfortably.
notes: QRT can be used as a gentle pregnancy-supportive relaxation practice.

warning_message: Gentle Bhramari may support calming during pregnancy when practiced softly and comfortably.
notes: Supportive non-strain breathing for pregnancy-sensitive contexts.

warning_message: Meditative settling can support pregnancy-safe calm and rest.
notes: Om Meditation can be offered as a quiet supportive option in pregnancy.

warning_message: Use chair-based breathing and relaxed movement when balance risk or vertigo is present.
notes: Chair-based respiratory support is safer than unsupported standing or inversion options.

warning_message: Supine deep relaxation can be used as a safer supportive option when vertigo is present.
notes: DRT offers low-demand rest support in balance-sensitive situations.
